zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Kirkpatrick於大約1662年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn32歲，母親Helenor Stewart18歲。他於1690年與Chloe Coward在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1738年6月3日在美國新澤西州薩默塞特明 布魯克享年77歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Kirkpatrick于大约1662年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn32岁，母亲Helenor Stewart18岁。他于1690年与Chloe Coward在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1738年6月3日在美国新泽西州薩默塞特明 布魯克享年77岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Kirkpatrick was born about 1662, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn, was 32 and his mother, Helenor Stewart, was 18. He married Chloe Coward in 1690, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 June 1738, in Mine Brook, Somerset, New Jersey, United States, at the age of 77, and was buried in Somerset, New Jersey, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Kirkpatrick est né environ 1662, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Helenor Stewart, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Chloe Coward en 1690, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juin 1738, à Mine Brook, Somerset, New Jersey, États-Unis, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, New Jersey, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Kirkpatrick um 1662 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn 32 und seine Mutter Helenor Stewart 18. Er hat 1690 in Scotland Chloe Coward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juni 1738 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Mine Brook, Somerset, New Jersey, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Somerset, New Jersey, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Kirkpatrickが約1662年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburnは32歳，母Helenor Stewartは18歳であった。1690年にスコットランドでChloe Cowardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1738年6月3日にアメリカ合衆国ニュージャージー州ソメルセトミン ブルークで77歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュージャージー州ソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Kirkpatrick(이)가 대략 1662년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Helenor Stewart(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1690년 스컷랜드에서 Chloe Coward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1738년 6월 3일 미국 뉴저지 주 서머세트 마이인 브룩에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴저지 주 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Kirkpatrick nasceu aproximadamente 1662, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Helenor Stewart, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Chloe Coward em 1690, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de junho de 1738, em Mine Brook, Somerset, Nova Jérsei, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, New Jersey, British Colonial America.

ru.Peapack, Somerset, New Jersey, United St: пипакк-гладстоун бороую, сомирсет, Нью-Джерси, Соединенные штаты
ru.Mine Brook, Somerset, New Jersey, BCA: маин брук, сомирсет, Нью-Джерси, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Kirkpatrick родился около 1662 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Helenor Stewart, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Chloe Coward в 1690 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 июня 1738 г. в местности маин брук, сомирсет, Нью-Джерси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Нью-Джерси, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Kirkpatrick nació aproximadamente 1662, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Helenor Stewart, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Chloe Coward en 1690, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de junio de 1738, en Mine Brook, Somerset, Nueva Jersey, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, New Jersey, British Colonial America.
